problem: Why does the immune system attack the body's own tissue in autoimmune disease?
mechanism: Autophagy activation to clear misfolded proteins
hypothesis: If Autophagy activation to clear misfolded proteins is applied to in, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 16 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
